result:
Built the Nexus AI landing page across three files in `/home/runner/work/ai-web-builder/ai-web-builder/nexus-ai-light-landing/`:

- **`index.html`** — semantic structure: frosted navbar, hero with floating stat cards, 3-column features grid with Unsplash thumbnails, stats band, 3-card testimonials, gradient CTA, and footer.
- **`style.css`** — Inter font, `#2f6bff` primary + coral accent, soft layered shadows, hover scale-up on buttons/cards, frosted nav via `backdrop-filter`, full Grid/Flex responsive layout with two breakpoints (≤980px tablet, ≤720px mobile), and `prefers-reduced-motion` fallback.
- **`script.js`** — Intersection Observer reveal (fade + slide-up with staggered `data-delay`), scroll-triggered nav shadow, mobile menu toggle, smooth anchor scrolling, and footer year stamp.

Open `index.html` directly in a browser — no build step.
